prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海市综合类最低位次分别为约1529名、2335名、2393名、2684名、4096名，整体呈持续后移趋势，尤其2025年较2024年后移1412名，降幅显著；2025年基准位次约4096名；该校在上海市综合类招生计划2021年仅10人，2022年大幅增至82人，2023年103人，2024年89人，2025年91人；2026年计划82人，较2025年减少9人（缩招约9.9%），缩招加剧了竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海交通大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2021–2026年稳居第4名，属全国顶尖高校，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及学术不端、师德师风等事件共16起（0正面/11负面/5中性）；抖音热度排名第42位（较热），综合热度约98.96万；2021年曾出现投档线异常信号（低关注），但近年未见明显断档记录。负面舆情可能轻微抑制部分考生报考热情；第五轮学科评估A-及以上学科多达28个，其中A+学科包括生物学、机械工程、材料科学与工程、计算机科学与技术、临床医学、口腔医学、工商管理、管理科学与工程、外国语言文学等，学科实力极强，对工科、医科、经管类考生吸引力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年上海市考生总数约66,700人，较2025年49,276人增加约35.4%，竞争显著加剧；上海交通大学校本部位于上海市，对本市考生具有天然地域吸引力；2021–2024年本地招生占比分别为1.34%、9.76%、10.19%、11.73%，占比逐年提升，本地考生报考意愿较强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划缩招约9.9%、上海市考生总数大幅增加约35.4%等主要下行压力，以及学校顶尖层次和强大优势学科提供的支撑，预计2026年最低位次在2025年基准4096名基础上继续小幅后移，但后移幅度较2025年明显收窄。预测最低位次约4003名，区间3547–4459名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 人工智能（拔尖英才试点班）
- 电子信息类（IEEE试点班）
- 电子信息类（计算机永强试验班）
- 机器人工程（智能系统拔尖班/自主智能领军班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 机械类（钱学森工程科学试点班）
- 船舶与海洋工程（双学士学位班）
- 材料科学与工程（徐祖耀荣誉班）
- 电子信息类（集成电路英才班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 自然科学试验班（含化学、化工、环境、生物、药学等）
- 工科试验班类（生医工学院,智能医工试点班）
- 具身智能（拔尖英才试点班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间3547–4459名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如3500名以内）可重点冲刺一档的人工智能、IEEE试点班等王牌专业；位次在区间中段（约4000名）应以二档的机械类、材料类为核心目标；位次接近区间上限（约4400名）建议优先考虑三档的自然科学试验班等专业，确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for comprehensive subjects in Shanghai were approximately 1529, 2335, 2393, 2684, and 4096, showing a continuous backward trend. Notably, in 2025, the ranking shifted back by 1412 positions compared to 2024, a significant decline. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 4096. The enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects in Shanghai was only 10 in 2021, sharply increased to 82 in 2022, 103 in 2023, 89 in 2024, and 91 in 2025. For 2026, the plan is 82, a decrease of 9 (about 9.9% reduction) compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai Jiao Tong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It has consistently ranked 4th in the Shanghai Ranking's Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, making it a top-tier national university with strong appeal to high-scoring students. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving 16 incidents of academic misconduct and faculty ethics (0 positive, 11 negative, 5 neutral). Its Douyin popularity ranks 42nd (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 989,600. In 2021, there was an abnormal signal in the admission cutoff line (low attention), but no significant gaps have been observed in recent years. Negative public opinion may slightly suppress some students' enthusiasm for application. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university has 28 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ disciplines such as Biology, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, Business Administration, Management Science and Engineering, and Foreign Languages and Literature. Its academic strength is extremely strong, particularly attractive to students in engineering, medicine, and economics/management.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of examinees in Shanghai is approximately 66,700, an increase of about 35.4% compared to 49,276 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. The main campus of Shanghai Jiao Tong University is located in Shanghai, providing natural geographical appeal to local students. From 2021 to 2024, the local enrollment proportions were 1.34%, 9.76%, 10.19%, and 11.73%, respectively, showing a year-on-year increase, indicating strong willingness of local students to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment plan reduction of about 9.9%, and the substantial increase of about 35.4% in the total number of examinees in Shanghai as major downward pressures, along with the support from the university's top-tier status and strong advantageous disciplines, it is expected that the minimum ranking for 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 4096, but the magnitude of the shift will be significantly narrower than in 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 4003, with a range of 3547 to 4459.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Artificial Intelligence (Top Talent Pilot Class)
- Electronic Information (IEEE Pilot Class)
- Electronic Information (Computer Yongqiang Experimental Class)
- Robotics Engineering (Intelligent Systems Top Class/Autonomous Intelligent Leading Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mechanical Engineering (Qian Xuesen Engineering Science Pilot Class)
- Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering (Dual Degree Program)
- Materials Science and Engineering (Xu Zuyao Honor Class)
- Electronic Information (Integrated Circuit Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Natural Science Experimental Class (including Chemistry, Chemical Engineering, Environment, Biology, Pharmacy, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (School of Biomedical Engineering, Intelligent Medical Engineering Pilot Class)
- Embodied Intelligence (Top Talent Pilot Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3547 to 4459, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main target, use Tier 1 majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 3500), prioritize Tier 1 majors such as Artificial Intelligence and IEEE Pilot Class. For rankings in the middle of the range (around 4000), target Tier 2 majors like Mechanical Engineering and Materials Science. For rankings near the upper bound (around 4400), consider Tier 3 majors such as Natural Science Experimental Class to ensure admission.
